notes: The first full-lesson regeneration attempt was stopped because it converged too slowly and repeatedly missed word-count checks.
The final repair path regenerated only affected practice items/passages with GPT-4o, preserving clean lesson structure while requiring new topics/domains and longer passages.
The final dry run of scripts/regenerate-topic-variety-lessons.ts found zero remaining V2 lessons needing topic-variety or passage-length regeneration.
The final dry run of scripts/cleanup-v2-samples-local.py found zero short sample passages and zero intra-lesson duplicate clusters.
